props.name: distance
props.description: Distance (in pixels) the component moves during animation.

props.name: reverse
props.description: Whether the animation moves in the reverse direction.

props.name: duration
props.description: Duration of the animation in seconds.

props.name: ease
props.description: GSAP easing function for the animation.

props.name: animateOpacity
props.description: Whether to animate opacity during transition.

props.name: onComplete
props.description: Callback function called when animation completes.

props.name: dissappearAfter
props.description: Time in seconds after which the content will disappear. Disabled if set to 0.

props.name: disappearDuration
props.description: Duration of the disappearance animation in seconds.

props.name: disappearEase
props.description: GSAP easing function for the disappearance animation.

props.name: onDisappearanceComplete
props.description: Callback function called when disappearance animation completes.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes to apply to the animated component.
